title: crataegus crus-galli var. linearis
intro: Crataegus crus-galli var. linearis, also known as the Chinese hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus crus-galli var. linearis include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and improving cardiovascular function, making it a popular herbal remedy for heart health. Crataegus crus-galli var. linearis can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall cardiovascular well-being.
